div.p: Apply for leave, check your balance and track your requests

p.t: Something went wrong. Please try again.

t.t-value: 0 if pct < 0 else (pct if pct <= 100 else 100)

t.div: No line manager assigned. Please contact HR — leave requests require a line manager for approval.

div.span: These dates overlap with an existing leave request.

div.label: Supporting Document (Optional) *
div.div: Accepted: PDF, DOC, PNG, JPG, XLSX (max 10MB)
A supporting document is mandatory for this leave type.

button.title: Cannot submit: no line manager assigned

div.class: card-header bg-transparent border-0 py-3 px-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2

button.title: Send reminder to manager
button.onclick: return confirm('Send a reminder to your manager for this leave request?');

div.p: You haven't submitted any leave requests yet.

div.small: Contact your HR administrator to assign a line manager.

div.class: alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show mb-4

div.p: This leave request is still pending. You can cancel it if your plans have changed.

button.onclick: return confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel this leave request?');
